text.title: Claude-Driven UX Methodology Bundle Procedure
text.summary: 3-step procedure to apply the CLAUDE-methodologies methodology end-to-end.

step.name: extract-signals
step.action: Identify: surface (2D/spatial/voice), modality count, AI involvement (generative, evaluation, plugin), brand-system maturity.

step.name: apply-routing-rules
step.action: Map signals → methodology(ies). Cap at 3 methodologies per task to respect context budget.
step.decision-gate: If >3 candidates match, reject and ask user to scope task.

step.name: compose-load-brief
step.action: Write a load brief: which methodology to load first, why, what to skip.
